special_mechanics.name: Character Switching
special_mechanics.description: Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, and Princess Leia can be used as playable characters. Han and Leia have limited lives (one life each) unlike Luke. Different characters have distinct attributes.

special_mechanics.name: Landspeeder Segments
special_mechanics.description: Luke pilots a landspeeder around Tatooine in platforming segments

special_mechanics.name: Millennium Falcon Perspective
special_mechanics.description: First-person perspective segment navigating through asteroid field

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF) contain no quantified physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or frame-based movement values. Game documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics, story progression, and character attributes rather than low-level physics implementation.
